name: Router Bridge
description: Delegates coding tasks to openclaw-router via configurable execution backends.

backendMode.description: Which execution backend to use for coding tasks.

scopeMode.description: Scope at which router overrides apply.

routerCommand.description: Shell command to invoke openclaw-router CLI.

fallbackToNativeOnError.description: Fall back to native execution if router backend errors.

healthCacheTtlMs.description: Cache TTL in milliseconds for router health checks.

threadBindingMode.description: How ACP sessions bind to threads (Phase 2)

targetHarnessId.description: Harness identifier for the ACP router adapter.

backendMode.label: Execution Backend
backendMode.help: Choose how coding tasks are routed: native agent, router-bridge delegation, or router-acp.

scopeMode.label: Override Scope
scopeMode.help: Whether router overrides apply per-thread, per-session, or globally.

routerCommand.label: Router CLI Command
routerCommand.help: Command used to invoke the openclaw-router CLI.

routerConfigPath.label: Router Config Path
routerConfigPath.help: Filesystem path to the openclaw-router YAML config.

fallbackToNativeOnError.label: Fallback on Error
fallbackToNativeOnError.help: Automatically switch to native execution if the router backend fails.

healthCacheTtlMs.label: Health Check Cache TTL (ms)
healthCacheTtlMs.help: How long (in milliseconds) to cache router health check results.

targetHarnessId.label: Target Harness ID
targetHarnessId.help: Harness identifier for the ACP router adapter.
